body:
## What

Implement API client and service layer for frontend-backend communication using axios, with token management and error handling.

## 内容

实现前后端通信的 API 层，使用 axios 封装请求逻辑，并加入 token 管理和统一错误处理。

## Included

• Created axios client with baseURL configuration

• Added request interceptor to inject Authorization Bearer token

• Added response interceptor to normalize error messages

• Implemented auth API (register / login / logout / refresh)

• Implemented user API (getProfile / updateProfile / etc.)

• Implemented match API (getMatches / getMatch / getReplay)

• Implemented leaderboard API

• Created tokenUtils for localStorage token management

## 包含内容

• 创建 axios 实例并配置 baseURL

• 添加请求拦截器自动注入 Authorization token

• 添加响应拦截器统一错误信息

• 实现 auth 相关接口（注册 / 登录 / 登出 / 刷新 token）

• 实现 user 相关接口（获取用户信息等）

• 实现 match 相关接口

• 实现 leaderboard 接口

• 封装 tokenUtils 管理 localStorage 中的 token

## Verification

• API requests are successfully sent to backend

• tokenUtils correctly stores and clears token

• Error messages are normalized via interceptor

• API layer is decoupled from UI components

## 验证

• API 请求可以正常发送到后端

• tokenUtils 能正确存储和清除 token

• 错误信息通过拦截器统一处理

• API 层与 UI 完全解耦

## Notes

• Auth endpoints currently return 500 due to missing JWT_SECRET on backend

• Some endpoints return 404/501 as backend implementation is not merged yet

• Authorization header injection not fully verified due to backend errors

## 备注

• 登录/注册接口返回 500，是由于后端未配置 JWT_SECRET

• 部分接口返回 404/501，是因为后端尚未实现或未合并

• 由于后端报错，Authorization header 注入尚未完全验证

reviews.body:
accessToken vs token field name mismatch — The backend POST /api/auth/login now returns data.accessToken (unified in PR #48), but the API layer likely reads data.token. Please check the response field name in authApi.js (or equivalent) and align with accessToken. Same applies for POST /api/auth/register. This is a blocking correctness issue for login/register to work end-to-end.
PrivateRoute still reads localStorage.getItem('token') directly — same issue as PR #53 above; since tokenUtils is already available, getToken() should be used. If this PR builds on #53, please resolve there first.
refresh endpoint called with refreshToken in request body — the backend /api/auth/refresh expects a refreshToken field in the body. Confirm the API service is sending it correctly, not a leftover access token.
baseURL should come from an environment variable — hardcoding http://localhost:3000 means the Docker or production URL won't work without a code change. Use import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL with a fallback, and add VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3000 to .env.example.

title: Feat/api layer
